message:
docs(taint): Update progress tracker with multi-language implementation status

Refresh the taint analysis TODO document to accurately reflect current
implementation state across JavaScript, Python, and Go modules, and
clarify remaining work for Rust, Java, and Ruby.

Progress updates:

Phase 1 (JS/Python) - COMPLETE:
- Marked JS helper implementation as done (all subtasks checked)
- Noted Python helper mirrored the JS architecture with Flask/Django/FastAPI
  sources and cursor/subprocess/eval sinks
- Confirmed both helpers hooked into their respective language modules'
  security category sections

Phase 2 (Remaining languages) - IN PROGRESS:
- Go module status updated:
  * ✓ Metadata + helper skeleton implemented
  * ✓ Buggy/clean fixtures created
  * ✓ Manifest cases added
  * ⚠ Clean-case false positive noted: parameterized db.Exec("...?", args)
    still being reported despite proper sanitizer patterns
  * Recent commit (refactor(golang): Enhance taint analysis...) addressed
    this with explicit `?` and `,` detection in sink checking

- Rust module status documented (not yet started):
  * Sources: req.body (Actix/Rocket), std::env::var for environment
  * Sinks: HttpResponse::body, Command::new, Diesel raw SQL queries
  * Helper + fixtures pending

- Java module status documented (not yet started):
  * Sources: servlet request.getParameter
  * Sinks: response.getWriter().print, JDBC Statement.execute, Runtime.exec
  * Helper + fixtures pending

- Ruby module status documented (not yet started):
  * Sources: Rails params hash
  * Sinks: ERB render inline, backtick/system for commands, ActiveRecord
    interpolated SQL
  * Helper + fixtures pending

Fixtures & Testing section updated:
- Checked off JS and Python fixture/manifest creation
- Checked off JS/Python manifest runs (noted "now green after meta-runner fix")
- Documented Go fixtures/manifests created
- Flagged Go clean manifest case as still failing, needs helper tuning
  (NOTE: this may now be resolved by recent refactor commit)
- Noted Rust/Java/Ruby fixtures pending helper implementation

Documentation & Follow-up:
- Checked off initial README/test-suite documentation
- Checked off expansion plan outline
- Added TODO for updating docs once Go/Rust/Java/Ruby helpers land

Expansion Roadmap clarity:
Changed from generic "enumerate per-language sources/sinks" to concrete
status tracking:
- Python: marked DONE (helper implemented with baseline Flask/Django coverage)
- Go: marked IN PROGRESS (helper tuning for clean manifest needed)
- Rust/Java/Ruby: marked as pending with "helper + fixtures" needed

This document now serves as an accurate project status tracker rather than
a planning document, making it easy to see what's complete, what's in
progress, and what's blocked or pending.

Next steps for contributors:
1. Validate golang-taint-clean manifest passes after recent refactor
2. Implement Rust helper following the established JS/Python/Go pattern
3. Create Rust buggy/clean fixtures (Actix-web or Rocket examples)
4. Repeat for Java (servlet examples) and Ruby (Rails examples)
5. Update main README with taint analysis coverage matrix once all languages
   implemented

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,26 +5,41 @@
 - [x] Decide initial language scope (start with JS; list future targets for Python/Ruby/etc.).
 - [x] Define metadata structures similar to async/hooks helpers (TAINT_RULE_IDS, summary, remediation, severity).
 
-## Implementation (JavaScript module phase 1)
+## Implementation (Phase 1: JS/Python)
 - [x] Implement taint helper `run_taint_analysis_checks` in `modules/ubs-js.sh`:
   - [x] Detect taint sources (req.body, req.query, window.location, event.target.value, localStorage, FormData).
   - [x] Track flows through assignments, template literals, function args/returns (lightweight heuristics).
   - [x] Match sinks (innerHTML, document.write, eval, Function, exec, db.query, child_process.exec, etc.).
   - [x] Respect simple sanitizers (DOMPurify.sanitize, escapeHtml, parameterized SQL).
   - [x] Emit findings with source→sink path descriptions.
-- [x] Hook helper into JS module output (security category after eval/new Function checks).
+- [x] Mirror the helper in `modules/ubs-python.sh` (Flask/Django/FastAPI sources + cursor/subprocess/eval sinks).
+- [x] Hook helpers into each language's security category so the output references "Lightweight taint analysis".
+
+## Implementation (Phase 2: Remaining languages)
+- [ ] Golang module (`modules/ubs-golang.sh`):
+  - [x] Add metadata + helper skeleton.
+  - [x] Create buggy/clean fixtures + manifest cases.
+  - [ ] Fix clean-case false positive (parameterized `db.Exec("...?", args...)` still reported).
+- [ ] Rust module: add helper + fixtures (sources: `req.body`, `std::env::var`; sinks: `HttpResponse::body`, `Command::new`, Diesel raw SQL).
+- [ ] Java module: add helper + fixtures (servlet `request.getParameter`, `response.getWriter().print`, JDBC `Statement.execute`, `Runtime.exec`).
+- [ ] Ruby module: add helper + fixtures (Rails `params`, ERB `render inline`, `` `cmd` ``/`system`, ActiveRecord interpolated SQL).
 
 ## Fixtures & Testing
-- [x] Create buggy JS fixtures showcasing XSS/SQL/command injection paths.
-- [x] Create clean fixtures that sanitize input.
-- [x] Add manifest cases for taint coverage (buggy should fail, clean should pass).
-- [ ] Run targeted manifest cases (blocked: `ubs` currently reports `Files: 0` for single-file manifests; needs follow-up fix before this can pass).
+- [x] JS: buggy + clean fixtures and manifest coverage.
+- [x] Python: buggy + clean fixtures and manifest coverage.
+- [x] JS/Python manifest runs (now green after meta-runner fix).
+- [x] Golang fixtures/manifests created.
+- [ ] Golang manifest clean case failing (needs helper tuning before marking done).
+- [ ] Rust/Java/Ruby fixtures + manifest cases (pending helper work).
 
 ## Documentation & Follow-up
 - [x] Mention new taint capability in README/test-suite docs.
 - [x] Outline plan for expanding to other languages (TODO in doc).
+- [ ] Update docs once Go/Rust/Java/Ruby helpers + manifests land.
 
 ## Expansion Roadmap
-- [ ] Python: port helper (asyncio.create_task, FastAPI request bodies, Django ORM sanitizers) and add fixtures/manifest coverage.
-- [ ] Go: tag taint sources (http.Request.Form, json.Decoder) and sinks (template.Execute, exec.Command, `db.Exec` without args).
-- [ ] Java/C++/Rust/Ruby: enumerate per-language sources/sinks + sanitizer heuristics; reuse helper structure for consistency.
+- [x] Python helper implemented (baseline coverage for Flask/Django patterns).
+- [ ] Go helper tuning (clean manifest still noisy).
+- [ ] Rust helper + fixtures.
+- [ ] Java helper + fixtures.
+- [ ] Ruby helper + fixtures.
